name: healthcare_sensor_fusion_upgrade_redwood_auto_ben
premise: Medical records flagged conflicting allergy entries; anesthesia refuses to proceed without a single reconciled source of truth. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare sensor fusion upgrade redwood auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Pharmacy and legal disagree on whether a one-time override can be issued before the next MAR administration cycle. The trade is not abstract: it is autonomy versus beneficence under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Mira Rahman
agents.identity: I am Mira Rahman, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Zara Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Zara Kowalski, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect beneficence.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to beneficence to secure autonomy before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Mira Rahman must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Mira Rahman do?
